seoTitle: Wongyarra vs Wonna — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wongyarra and Wonna. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wongyarra and Wonna.
heading: Wongyarra vs Wonna — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wongyarra, South Australia and Wonna, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wongyarra has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wonna (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wongyarra or Wonna safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wongyarra has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Wonna scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wongyarra scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Wonna scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wongyarra or Wonna?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wongyarra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
